dimensions.summary: One compact Home exception card resolves an exact provider invocation without adding a mode, settings route, reusable grant surface or competing Recent Work status.

Seven exact selectors bind strict schemas, private storage, Job recovery, Home and ingest authorization, typed IPC and single-owner UI only to existing partial API, Job, security and E1.16/E2.09/E2.10/E3.03 rows.

Development gets one exact request lifecycle and typed main/preload boundary while preserving ordinary prompt-free calls, Permission Broker isolation, Job CAS, cancellation and fail-closed drift behavior.
Existing Owner, quality, Playbook and acceptance surfaces absorb the exact adoption; no PRD, Decision, new document, prototype, setting, dependency, Permission Broker breadth or status change.
